name: Overall Software Carbon Intensity
description: Core SCI rate across the defined software boundary and functional unit.
functional_unit: R: versioned functional unit from Functional Unit Registry
authoritative_system: SCI calculation service + telemetry warehouse + functional-unit registry (Phase 2 binding TBD)
measurement_mode: derived SCI rate from E, I, M, and R components
granularity: per functional unit and reporting boundary version
accounting_boundary: Versioned software boundary including compute, storage, network, and allocated embodied hardware effects.
representation_risk: Boundary version drift; missing source-system bindings; component-level data quality varies by KPI.
feedback_latency: TBD until SCI calculation cadence and authoritative component feeds are fixed.
decision_lever: Architecture trade-offs, release gates, workload placement, and software-carbon reduction targets.
data_sources: Energy telemetry or modeled energy demand; Carbon intensity factor with time and region attributes; Embodied emissions allocation table; Functional unit count
source_refs: DHLCO2-8; DHLCO2-10; DHLCO2-11; DOCX section 5.1; DOCX table 9
unknowns: Final source-system bindings for E, I, M, and R are TBD.; BoundaryVersionID governance is TBD.

name: Total software emissions for reporting period
description: Absolute emissions derived from SCI rate multiplied by activity volume for a defined period.
functional_unit: R total: functional-unit volume for the reporting period
authoritative_system: Reporting data mart + SCI calculation service (Phase 2 binding TBD)
measurement_mode: aggregation from rate metric and activity volume
granularity: per reporting period, service boundary, and functional unit
accounting_boundary: Same versioned boundary as SCI-001; totals may only aggregate compatible functional units and boundary versions.
representation_risk: Aggregation risk if functional units, periods, or boundaries are mixed; reporting use requires maturity gate.
feedback_latency: TBD until reporting cadence and activity-volume feed are fixed.
decision_lever: Portfolio baselining, reporting reconciliation, and prioritization of reduction initiatives.
data_sources: SCI calculation output; Activity volume counters; Reporting period calendar and boundary version
iso_refs: GHG Protocol Scope 2 Guidance; GHG Protocol Scope 3 Standard; ISO 14064-1:2018
unknowns: Reporting boundary and consolidation rules are TBD.; Compatibility checks for aggregation are TBD.

name: CI/CD pipeline emissions per run
description: Candidate KPI for build-phase pipeline runs.
authoritative_system: CI platform + runner telemetry + cloud billing scope (temporary placeholders)
provisional_owner: Build KPI workstream owner (temporary via PRX-004)
measurement_mode: derived SCI from telemetry, billing, and carbon-intensity weighting
accounting_boundary: Candidate boundary: one CI/CD pipeline run including runner compute and allocated cloud usage; shared-runner allocation remains TBD.
representation_risk: Proxy use; shared-runner allocation uncertainty; source-system identifiers TBD; ISO mapping incomplete.
feedback_latency: TBD until source-system bindings and reporting cadence are fixed.
decision_lever: Pipeline scheduling, runner selection, and shared-runner allocation policy.
data_sources: CI logs (TBD system name); Runner metrics (TBD metric ids); Cloud billing/usage (TBD account scope)
unknowns: Carbon intensity source is TBD.; Shared runner allocation rule is TBD.

name: Test environment emissions per test-hour
description: Candidate KPI for test environment operation.
authoritative_system: Test environment telemetry + infrastructure metrics + cloud billing scope (temporary placeholders)
provisional_owner: Build KPI workstream owner (temporary via PRX-004)
measurement_mode: derived SCI from environment telemetry, billing, and carbon-intensity weighting
accounting_boundary: Candidate boundary: test environment operation window allocated to test-hours; cross-team allocation remains TBD.
representation_risk: Proxy use; boundary uncertainty; cross-team allocation uncertainty; source-system identifiers TBD; ISO mapping incomplete.
feedback_latency: TBD until environment telemetry bindings and reporting cadence are fixed.
decision_lever: Test environment runtime, sizing, and shutdown policy.
data_sources: Test environment telemetry (TBD provider); Infrastructure metrics (TBD metric ids); Cloud billing/usage (TBD account scope)
unknowns: Test environment boundary is TBD.; Allocation across teams is TBD.

name: Build minutes per artifact
description: Candidate KPI for build effort and energy proxy.
authoritative_system: CI platform + artifact registry metrics (temporary placeholders)
provisional_owner: Build KPI workstream owner (temporary via PRX-004)
measurement_mode: derived SCI with build-time telemetry and artifact allocation logic
accounting_boundary: Candidate boundary: build and release activity per artifact or release event; artifact granularity remains TBD.
representation_risk: Proxy use; artifact granularity uncertainty; energy-conversion uncertainty; source-system identifiers TBD; ISO mapping incomplete.
feedback_latency: TBD until build-stage bindings and release-event cadence are fixed.
decision_lever: Build-stage optimization, artifact packaging, and release frequency.
data_sources: CI logs (TBD build stage granularity); Artifact registry metrics (TBD source)
unknowns: Artifact granularity is TBD.; Energy conversion from build minutes is TBD.

name: ML training emissions per run
description: Candidate KPI for model training in development.
authoritative_system: Training telemetry + GPU/CPU metrics + cloud billing scope (temporary placeholders)
provisional_owner: Build KPI workstream owner (temporary via PRX-004)
measurement_mode: derived SCI with workload telemetry and amortized hardware contribution
accounting_boundary: Candidate boundary: one training run including workload telemetry and allocated hardware contribution; attribution remains TBD.
representation_risk: Proxy use; hardware amortization uncertainty; training attribution uncertainty; source-system identifiers TBD; ISO mapping incomplete.
feedback_latency: TBD until training telemetry bindings and reporting cadence are fixed.
decision_lever: Training frequency, hardware selection, and run-gating policy.
data_sources: Training telemetry (TBD platform); GPU/CPU metrics (TBD metric ids); Cloud billing/usage (TBD account scope)
unknowns: Training boundary and attribution are TBD.; Embodied carbon treatment for hardware is TBD.

name: Embodied carbon amortization per story point
description: Candidate KPI for indirect build emissions.
authoritative_system: Hardware inventory + amortization table + planning system (temporary placeholders)
provisional_owner: Build KPI workstream owner (temporary via PRX-004)
granularity: per story point or planning increment
accounting_boundary: Candidate boundary: hardware embodied emissions allocated to planning increments or story points; amortization method remains TBD.
representation_risk: Amortization uncertainty; normalization uncertainty; source-system identifiers TBD; ISO mapping incomplete.
feedback_latency: TBD until inventory source, planning binding, and refresh cadence are fixed.
decision_lever: Hardware refresh policy, amortization policy, and planning normalization.
data_sources: Hardware inventory (TBD source); Lifecycle amortization table (TBD method); Planning system story points (TBD source)
source_refs: DHLCO2-10; DHLCO2-4; Offer para 45; Offer para 64
unknowns: Amortization method is TBD.; Story-point normalization is TBD.

name: Emissions per transaction
description: Candidate KPI for run-phase SCI rate using operational R.
functional_unit: R2: 1 service request (Phase 1 decision; extension path to business-level units planned)
provisional_owner: Run KPI workstream owner (temporary via PRX-004)
granularity: per business transaction or service request count
accounting_boundary: Candidate boundary: operational service-request scope in Phase 1 with extension path to business transaction.
representation_risk: Proxy use; transaction taxonomy uncertainty; operative request-count binding TBD; source-system identifiers TBD; ISO mapping incomplete.
feedback_latency: TBD until APM/log bindings and reporting cadence are fixed.
decision_lever: Transaction design, service optimization, and boundary selection.
data_sources: APM traces (TBD source); Operational logs (TBD source); Carbon intensity feed (Phase 1: national averages via UBA; Phase 2: IEA/EMBER; target: Electricity Maps)
source_refs: DHLCO2-11; DHLCO2-8; Offer para 46; Offer para 62
unknowns: Transaction definition boundary is TBD (R2a service-request decided for Phase 1; extension to business-level units planned).; Operative data source for request counting is TBD (requires stakeholder alignment on monitoring system).

name: Energy per request
description: Candidate KPI for request-level operational energy.
functional_unit: R2: 1 service request (Phase 1 decision; extension path to business-level units planned)
provisional_owner: Run KPI workstream owner (temporary via PRX-004)
measurement_mode: observed energy metric with carbon-intensity weighting; R2a service-request denominator
accounting_boundary: Candidate boundary: request-level system boundary per service request; operative counter system remains TBD.
representation_risk: Proxy use; request-boundary uncertainty; operative denominator binding TBD; source-system identifiers TBD; ISO mapping incomplete.
feedback_latency: TBD until service/infrastructure bindings and reporting cadence are fixed.
decision_lever: Request efficiency, autoscaling, and infrastructure right-sizing.
data_sources: Service metrics (TBD source); Infrastructure metrics (TBD metric ids); Carbon intensity feed (Phase 1: national averages via UBA; Phase 2: IEA/EMBER; target: Electricity Maps)
unknowns: Request boundary definition is TBD (R2a decided; operative system TBD).; Carbon intensity: Phase 1 uses national averages; sampling strategy for Phase 2+ is TBD.

name: Data transfer emissions per GB
description: Candidate KPI for network transfer in operations.
functional_unit: R2: 1 service request (Phase 1 decision; extension path to business-level units planned)
authoritative_system: Network metrics + data egress billing (temporary placeholders)
provisional_owner: Run KPI workstream owner (temporary via PRX-004)
measurement_mode: derived SCI from transfer volumes and carbon-intensity weighting
accounting_boundary: Candidate boundary: data transfer within a defined service boundary per GB; internal versus external split remains TBD.
representation_risk: Proxy use; service-boundary uncertainty; traffic-split uncertainty; source-system identifiers TBD; ISO mapping incomplete.
feedback_latency: TBD until network and billing bindings plus reporting cadence are fixed.
decision_lever: Payload size, egress routing, and caching strategy.
data_sources: Network metrics (TBD source); Data egress billing (TBD source); Carbon intensity feed (Phase 1: national averages via UBA; Phase 2: IEA/EMBER; target: Electricity Maps)
unknowns: Service boundary for transfer accounting is TBD (R2a decided; operative system TBD).; Internal vs external traffic split is TBD.

name: Energy proportionality index
description: Candidate KPI for inefficiency detection at low utilization.
functional_unit: R2: 1 service request (Phase 1 decision; extension path to business-level units planned)
authoritative_system: Utilization metrics + power draw metrics (temporary placeholders)
provisional_owner: Run KPI workstream owner (temporary via PRX-004)
measurement_mode: observed efficiency ratio with operational telemetry context
granularity: per observation window or service slice
accounting_boundary: Candidate boundary: observation window or service slice for utilization-versus-power comparison.
representation_risk: Proxy use; threshold-definition uncertainty; interval-definition uncertainty; source-system identifiers TBD; ISO mapping incomplete.
feedback_latency: TBD until observation windows, thresholds, and reporting cadence are fixed.
decision_lever: Capacity right-sizing, utilization targets, and workload placement.
data_sources: Utilization metrics (TBD source); Power draw metrics (TBD source)
unknowns: Threshold definition is TBD (R2a decided; operative calibration TBD).; Measurement interval is TBD.

name: Power Usage Effectiveness
description: Infrastructure overhead factor used to contextualize IT energy demand.
formula: PUE = Total facility energy / IT equipment energy
authoritative_system: Facility telemetry or provider reporting portal (Phase 2 binding TBD)
measurement_mode: observed or provider-reported infrastructure efficiency metric
granularity: per facility, region, provider, or platform slice
accounting_boundary: Facility-level overhead associated with the software boundary through allocation policy.
representation_risk: Provider aggregation and allocation uncertainty; may not be service-specific in Phase 1.
feedback_latency: TBD until provider/facility reporting cadence is fixed.
decision_lever: Facility/provider selection, workload placement, and infrastructure efficiency improvement.
data_sources: Data-center telemetry (TBD source); Cloud or colocation provider sustainability reports; Facility energy metering
source_refs: DOCX section 3.2.4; DOCX table 3; DOCX table 9
unknowns: DHL-relevant facility/provider PUE source is TBD.; Allocation from facility level to service boundary is TBD.

name: Carbon Usage Effectiveness
description: Facility or platform carbon efficiency context for operational emissions.
formula: CUE = Total CO2e emissions / IT equipment energy
authoritative_system: Facility telemetry + carbon-intensity provider + provider reporting portal (Phase 2 binding TBD)
granularity: per facility, region, provider, or platform slice
accounting_boundary: Facility or provider boundary mapped to the software boundary through versioned allocation policy.
representation_risk: Carbon-factor source and provider aggregation uncertainty; location-based versus market-based interpretation must remain explicit.
feedback_latency: TBD until carbon-intensity and facility reporting cadence is fixed.
decision_lever: Regional placement, provider comparison, and carbon-aware scheduling.
data_sources: Facility emissions data; Grid carbon-intensity factors; Provider sustainability reports
source_refs: DOCX section 3.2.4; DOCX table 3; DOCX table 9
unknowns: Carbon-intensity provider policy is TBD beyond Phase-1 baseline.; Facility-to-service allocation key is TBD.

name: Average infrastructure utilization
description: Utilization context for interpreting energy proportionality and idle capacity.
functional_unit: Observation window for platform or service slice
authoritative_system: Observability platform + capacity management system (Phase 2 binding TBD)
measurement_mode: observed utilization metric with service-boundary allocation
granularity: per host, cluster, namespace, service slice, or observation window
accounting_boundary: Infrastructure slice that supports the measured service boundary, including idle-capacity treatment.
representation_risk: Shared-infrastructure attribution and idle-capacity allocation uncertainty.
feedback_latency: TBD until observability bindings and sampling windows are fixed.
decision_lever: Right-sizing, autoscaling, scheduling, and energy-proportionality improvement.
data_sources: Host metrics; Container or cluster metrics; Capacity management data
source_refs: DOCX section 3.2.4; DOCX table 3; DOCX table 9
unknowns: Utilization metric IDs and sampling interval are TBD.; Idle-capacity allocation rule is TBD.

name: KPI data completeness
description: Share of required KPI input fields populated from documented source classes.
formula: Complete required fields / total required fields
authoritative_system: Data dictionary + lineage registry + calculation logs (Phase 2 binding TBD)
granularity: per KPI, source field, and reporting period
accounting_boundary: Metadata and source-field completeness for the KPI boundary under review.
representation_risk: Completeness can be overstated if placeholder fields are counted as authoritative.
feedback_latency: TBD until calculation-log and lineage capture are fixed.
decision_lever: Readiness gate for dashboard publication, reporting use, and Phase-2 instrumentation backlog.
data_sources: Data dictionary; Field-level lineage registry; KPI calculation logs
source_refs: DOCX section 8.6; DOCX table 9; DOCX appendix design principles
unknowns: Required field list and lineage registry implementation are TBD.; Threshold for publication readiness is TBD.

name: Measurement maturity level
description: Maturity score indicating whether a KPI is conceptual, proxy-estimated, telemetry-derived, or component-attributed.
authoritative_system: Measurement governance register + proxy catalog (Phase 2 binding TBD)
granularity: per KPI value, reporting period, and source-system binding
accounting_boundary: Trust classification attached to each generated KPI value.
representation_risk: Maturity labels become misleading if not versioned with source bindings and proxy retirement.
feedback_latency: TBD until quality review cadence is fixed.
decision_lever: Controls whether KPI values are used for exploratory insight, operational steering, or official totals.
data_sources: Data quality assessment; Source-system binding registry; Proxy register
source_refs: DOCX section 8.6; DOCX section 9.1; DOCX appendix design principles
unknowns: Formal maturity gate policy is TBD.; Owner for periodic maturity review is TBD.

name: Allocation policy compliance
description: Share of KPI calculations that reference an approved allocation policy where shared infrastructure is involved.
formula: Compliant KPI calculations / KPI calculations requiring allocation
authoritative_system: Allocation policy registry + calculation metadata store (Phase 2 binding TBD)
granularity: per KPI calculation, boundary version, and allocation policy
accounting_boundary: All KPI calculations using shared infrastructure or shared embodied-carbon pools.
representation_risk: Policy references may exist without sufficient evidence that the allocation key matches the actual usage pattern.
feedback_latency: TBD until allocation metadata is captured in calculation output.
decision_lever: Audit readiness, shared-infrastructure attribution, and prevention of double counting.
data_sources: Allocation policy registry; KPI calculation metadata; Boundary version registry
source_refs: DOCX section 8.5; DOCX section 9.3; DOCX appendix design principles
unknowns: Approved allocation-policy registry is TBD.; Evidence requirements for allocation-key validity are TBD.

name: Embodied carbon per request
description: Candidate KPI for hardware embodied carbon amortized to run-phase requests. Captures the M term of the SCI formula at per-request granularity.
authoritative_system: Hardware inventory + asset management + request monitoring (temporary placeholders)
provisional_owner: Infrastructure KPI workstream owner (temporary via PRX-004)
measurement_mode: estimated amortized embodied emissions per request
accounting_boundary: Hardware embodied CO2 linearly amortized over expected lifetime, divided by cumulative request count. Multi-GPU clusters summed; η_parallel efficiency correction applied to effective VRAM and output capacity.
representation_risk: Proxy use; inventory source uncertainty (±50% without vendor PCF); amortization period uncertainty; η_parallel is empirical; request count binding TBD; ISO mapping incomplete.
feedback_latency: TBD until hardware inventory source and request monitoring binding are fixed.
decision_lever: Hardware selection (vendor PCF availability), cluster configuration, refresh policy, workload routing.
data_sources: Hardware inventory (vendor PCF datasheet preferred; fallback Ecoinvent or proxy 0.5 kg CO2e/W TDP); Asset lifetime records (TBD asset management system); Request volume (TBD monitoring system)
unknowns: Vendor PCF datasheet availability per hardware asset is TBD.; η_parallel correction factor requires empirical benchmark validation.; Request count binding and monitoring system are TBD.

name: CAPEX amortized per request
description: Candidate KPI for hardware acquisition cost amortized to run-phase requests. Supporting decision metric for CostUsefulOutcome and cloud vs. on-prem trade-off analysis.
authoritative_system: Finance system + asset management + request monitoring (temporary placeholders)
provisional_owner: Infrastructure KPI workstream owner (temporary via PRX-004)
measurement_mode: derived cost metric from procurement and request telemetry
accounting_boundary: Hardware CAPEX linearly amortized over expected lifetime, divided by monthly request count. Cloud OPEX used directly when no on-prem CAPEX. Maintenance cost estimated as 10% of monthly amortization.
representation_risk: Finance data access TBD; amortization period uncertainty; CAPEX vs. OPEX boundary for hybrid or cloud scenarios TBD; no direct ISO CO2 normative reference (cost metric).
feedback_latency: TBD until finance system and request monitoring binding are fixed.
decision_lever: Hardware procurement decision, lifetime extension, cloud vs. on-prem routing, workload consolidation.
data_sources: Hardware procurement records (TBD finance system); Asset lifetime records (TBD asset management system); Request volume (TBD monitoring system)
iso_refs: N/A (cost metric, no ISO CO2 normative reference)
unknowns: Finance system data access and procurement record format are TBD.; CAPEX vs. OPEX boundary for hybrid and cloud scenarios is TBD.
